_comment: Pi MCP adapter config example. Place at .mcp.json in your project root. See docs/security/threat-model.md before using.

dark-research._comment: Path to the dark-research-mcp binary. Must be built with -tags allow_builtin_dark to load the dark constitution. See cmd/dark-research-mcp/ for the build flags.
dark-research._comment_args: Pass --constitution dark to activate the dark constitution. The light constitution is the default and is the right choice for non-research use.
dark-research._comment_lifecycle: lazy = connect on first tool call (recommended for performance). eager = connect at startup. keep-alive = persistent with health checks.
dark-research._comment_idleTimeout: Minutes before idle disconnect. The defense layer rate limit is in addition to this.
dark-research._comment_env: The binary reads SDD_LLM_API_KEY (or MINIMAX_API_KEY) and SDD_LLM_BASE_URL from env. Do NOT hardcode keys in .mcp.json.
